response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the Reference JSON for the first song's lyrics where provided. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Reference JSON for 'めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！' and transitioned to manual transcription for the remainder of that song and the entirety of '百花繚乱'. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep up with the fast-paced choreography and lyrics. Included visual text for song titles and credits.

subtitles.original: めにしゅきラッシュっしゅ！
subtitles.english: Menishuki Rashushu!

subtitles.original: Accept my full power!
subtitles.english: Accept my full power!

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅん らたっちゅら めにめに
subtitles.english: Kyunkyun ratacchura meni-meni

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅん らたっちゅら しゅきしゅきしゅきしゅき
subtitles.english: Kyunkyun ratacchura shuki-shuki-shuki-shuki

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅん らたっちゅら めにめに Oh yeah
subtitles.english: Kyunkyun ratacchura meni-meni Oh yeah

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅんきゅんとくんとー？ 「てんきゅっきゅん」
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun-kyun tokun-to? "Tenkyu-kyun!"

subtitles.original: 例えばタイムループなんかしちゃったって
subtitles.english: For example, even if I did a time loop,

subtitles.original: 運命で選んじゃうのはキミ (Yeah yeah yeah)
subtitles.english: The one I'd choose by fate is you (Yeah yeah yeah)

subtitles.original: だしっと一斉全体いや絶対！
subtitles.english: Totally, no, absolutely!

subtitles.original: シンデレラフィットなのは そうキミ (Oh oh oh)
subtitles.english: The one who's a Cinderella fit is you (Oh oh oh)

subtitles.original: わたしが何度も負けて落ち込んだって
subtitles.english: Even if I lose many times and get depressed,

subtitles.original: めげずに特訓付き合っちゃって
subtitles.english: You don't give up and keep me company in training,

subtitles.original: モチベ上げるだけぶち上げちゃって (ななな ななななな)
subtitles.english: Raising my motivation, just cheering me up (Na-na-na...)

subtitles.original: ステップアップめっちゃしちゃって 勝って一緒に喜びあって
subtitles.english: Taking step-ups, winning and rejoicing together,

subtitles.original: うぅー！感謝してもしきれないんじゃ～！
subtitles.english: Ugh! I can't thank you enough!

subtitles.original: カタチだけなんてナンセンス
subtitles.english: It's nonsense to care only about form.

subtitles.original: カタチないものがいいんです
subtitles.english: I like things without form.

subtitles.original: えーっとね それはなんと云いますか
subtitles.english: Umm... how should I say that...

subtitles.original: わっ 待って待って！ 今ここで伝えたいんです！
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, wait! I want to convey it right here!

subtitles.original: 月並みだけど届けたい想い
subtitles.english: It's a cliché, but I want to deliver my feelings.

subtitles.original: 「こんなに大きくなりました♡」
subtitles.english: "I've grown so much"

subtitles.original: だから ちょーmany-manyな約束どかっとリリース
subtitles.english: So, a super many-many promise, delivered to you.

subtitles.original: もりもりmany-many返すから！
subtitles.english: I'll return it with many-many more!

subtitles.original: いつだって しゅきしゅきしゅきしゅきスプリームなお願い聞いて！
subtitles.english: Always, listen to my shuki-shuki Supreme request!

subtitles.original: わたし会いたーい Day by day
subtitles.english: I want to see you day by day.

subtitles.original: ちょーmany-manyぎゅーぎゅぎゅっとエールをリリース
subtitles.english: Super many-many gyu-gyu-gyutto cheer, delivered to you.

subtitles.original: 絶対ゼッタイ倍で返すから！
subtitles.english: I'll return it, absolutely, absolutely double!

subtitles.original: 手渡しじゃ何年かかるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder how many years it would take to hand it over.

subtitles.original: ヘビーすぎじゃない！？ でもねいいんじゃない！？
subtitles.english: Isn't it too heavy!? But isn't it okay??

subtitles.original: Gimme!! いつも愛をアリ・ガ・トゥー
subtitles.english: Gimme!! Always, love, th-a-n-k y-o-u!

subtitles.original: 甘いだけじゃダメだけどね
subtitles.english: It can't just be sweet, but...

subtitles.original: 今日くらいは許してよ… hum
subtitles.english: For today at least, please forgive me... hum.

subtitles.original: 大事な話だからもうちょ～～～～～っと
subtitles.english: It's an important talk, so just a bit loooooonger.

subtitles.original: ときめきだけで言えるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can say it with just excitement.

subtitles.original: 誠心誠意聴いてくれますか？
subtitles.english: Will you listen with all your heart?

subtitles.original: Ah～ (うぉー！)
subtitles.english: Ah~ (Uwoah!)

subtitles.original: だから ちょーmany-manyな約束どかっとリリース
subtitles.english: So, a super many-many promise, delivered to you.

subtitles.original: もりもりmany-many返すから！
subtitles.english: I'll return it with many-many more!

subtitles.original: いつだって しゅきしゅきしゅきしゅきスプリームなお願い聞いて！
subtitles.english: Always, listen to my shuki-shuki Supreme request!

subtitles.original: わたし会いたーい
subtitles.english: I want to see you.

subtitles.original: Day by day ちょーmany-manyぎゅーぎゅぎゅっとエールをリリース
subtitles.english: Day by day, super many-many gyu-gyu-gyutto cheer, delivered to you.

subtitles.original: 絶対ゼッタイ倍で返すから！
subtitles.english: I'll return it, absolutely, absolutely double!

subtitles.original: 手渡しじゃ何年かかっても
subtitles.english: Even if it takes years to hand it over,

subtitles.original: 会いたいじゃない！ 届けたいじゃない！
subtitles.english: I want to see you! I want to reach you!

subtitles.original: Gimme!! いつも愛をアリ・ガ・トゥー
subtitles.english: Gimme!! Always, love, th-a-n-k y-o-u!

subtitles.original: もっみゅん♡
subtitles.english: Momyun! ♡

subtitles.original: きゅっきゅん らたっちゅら めにめに Oh yeah
subtitles.english: Kyu-kyun ratacchura meni-meni Oh yeah

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅんきゅんとくんとー？
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun-kyun tokun-to?

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅんきゅんとくんとー？
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun-kyun tokun-to?

subtitles.original: きゅんきゅんきゅんきゅんきゅんきゅん！
subtitles.english: Kyun-kyun-kyun-kyun-kyun-kyun!

subtitles.original: ずーっとよろしくね！
subtitles.english: Always be with me, okay!

subtitles.original:
ゆらゆらり はらはらり
いろとりどり みだれ咲き
subtitles.english:
Swaying gently, fluttering down,
In a riot of colors, blooming wildly.

subtitles.original:
花の街 思い出す
この空から
subtitles.english:
From this sky,
I remember the city of flowers.

subtitles.original: [Title: 百花繚乱]
subtitles.english: [Title: Hyakka Ryoran (Profusion of Flowers)]

subtitles.original: ひょんな出来事から やってきたこの場所は
subtitles.english: Through an unexpected turn of events, I arrived at this place,

subtitles.original: 遥か遠くにあった 煌びやかな舞台
subtitles.english: A glittering stage that once seemed so far away.

subtitles.original: ハッとするほど鮮やかな世界が あるんだと知った
subtitles.english: I learned that a world so breathtakingly vivid truly exists,

subtitles.original: あなたの無理難題に 答えていく どんな旅に
subtitles.english: Responding to your impossible demands, on whatever journey it may be.

subtitles.original: あっと言わせるような奇想天外な 答え合わせで
subtitles.english: With an astonishing, out-of-the-box checking of answers,

subtitles.original: 辿り着いたその先に 新しい景色が待っているんだ
subtitles.english: A new landscape is waiting at the end of the road we've reached.

subtitles.original: 摩訶不思議なミステリー 次から次に起こるたび
subtitles.english: Every time a profound mystery occurs one after another,

subtitles.original: 巧妙なからくりも 暴いてみせましょう
subtitles.english: I'll expose even the most ingenious mechanisms.

subtitles.original: どんな難題でも 種や仕掛けはあるんだ
subtitles.english: No matter how difficult the problem, there's always a trick or a gimmick.

subtitles.original: 副作用は気にしない 必ず闇導き出すから
subtitles.english: I don't care about side effects; I'll definitely lead us out of the darkness.

subtitles.original: あぁ この場所で触れた 人の悲しみや喜びがある
subtitles.english: Ah, in this place, there are the sorrows and joys of the people I've touched.

subtitles.original: そのひとつひとつが 心を震わせる
subtitles.english: Every single one of them makes my heart tremble.

subtitles.original: はっとしちゃうほど鮮やかな世界が ここにあるんだ
subtitles.english: A world so vivid it takes your breath away is right here.

subtitles.original: あなたの無理難題に 答えていく毎日に
subtitles.english: In these days of responding to your impossible demands,

subtitles.original: あっと言わせるような奇想天外な 答え合わせで
subtitles.english: With an astonishing, out-of-the-box checking of answers...
